creator: hiten@uk.FreeBSD.org
text:
This problem also occured to me many times, in release 4.3, and 4.4,
and also 5.0-CURRENT which I am currently using, which does a 
buildworld everyday.. and updates ports and packages...

I think 'cvsupit' needs to be removed from the 'packages' list, and it 
should only exist in the 'ports' tree.  This will make life a lot easier
for Jordan. ;)

Although, this is my point of (honest) view.

-- 
 - Hiten Pandya
 - <hiten@uk.FreeBSD.org>
